summary: Frontend-only e2e of Aura Hotels admin portal. All 11 requested flows PASS: login+redirect, role-restricted sidebar (spa_manager sees only Dashboard/Spa/Notifications), direct URL access to /admin/staff redirects to dashboard, super_admin sees all 17 nav items and every page renders with correct page-title, Staff role change/add/toggle-active/remove all work with toasts, Front Desk check-in flip, Reservations search+filter, Rooms (22 cards, R-100 present), Guests (8 rows incl G-092841), Housekeeping (22 rows), Restaurant (6 menu items), Spa (4 appts), Events (3), Inventory (6), Invoices (6 incl INV-2026-0092), Marketing (3 campaigns), Reviews (respond-R-03 flips to Responded with toast), Notifications (5 rows + mark-all), Settings (prop-name save toast, int-stripe toggle disconnects). Mobile 375x800: sidebar off-screen, hamburger opens it.
critical_code_review_comments: Reviews.jsx uses mutable module-level `reviews` seed — state resets on remount but not shared; acceptable for mock but note for backend integration.
Mobile hamburger button previously lacked data-testid (added `hamburger-btn` during test to enable automation). No functional bug.
test_credentials: gm@aurahotels.com / any (Super Admin); spa@aurahotels.com / any (Spa Manager). Mock auth — any password.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only 8 demo cards exist on /admin/login (no separate general_manager demo since seed uses SUPER_ADMIN for GM email). PERMISSIONS map: notifications='*' so all roles see it. Spa Manager sidebar = Dashboard + Spa + Notifications by design. hamburger-btn testid was added by testing agent.
